report.defect_summary: [Create Role][P0] Persona collection task fails and blocks role creation at persona stage
report.report_text:
Module: Training Center > Create Role > persona_collection
Suggested Priority: P0

Phenomenon:
- Real role creation session rcs-20260327-221113-1110e0 for workflow_tester started successfully and entered persona_collection.
- The first persona task rc-a9eacd-collect failed as run arun-20260327-221157-1ef94c.
- Current failure_reason is assignment execution failed with exit=1.
- After that failure, downstream persona/profile/capability/review nodes no longer progressed, and role creation stayed in creating/persona_collection.

Direct Evidence From Runtime Events:
- The failed run tried to read ./.codex/skills/workspace-memory-context/SKILL.md inside the freshly created workflow_tester workspace and hit a path-not-found error.
- The same run then emitted repeated stream disconnect errors to https://gmn.chuangzuoli.com/responses and ended with turn.failed plus assignment execution failed with exit=1.

Expected Result:
- After a role is created and enters persona_collection, the first persona task should run successfully and continue the creation workflow.
- The created role workspace should not immediately fail on missing local dependency/skill path assumptions.

Actual Result:
- The first persona collection task failed with exit=1.
- The role creation workflow stayed stuck in persona_collection with one failed node and one blocked node.

Impact:
- workflow_tester cannot complete role creation and remains in creating state.
- This blocks using create-role as a reliable production workflow for new execution roles.

Evidence:
- D:\code\AI\J-Agents\Analyst\.test\20260327-233653-364\artifacts\01-role-creation-detail.json
- D:\code\AI\J-Agents\Analyst\.test\20260327-233653-364\artifacts\02-failed-node-status.json
- D:\code\AI\J-Agents\Analyst\.test\20260327-233653-364\artifacts\03-graph.json
